Patch Set 5:

I assume this is first step since it doesn't use the kunit API upstream yet. Tim do you plan on moving in that direction?

Patch Set 5:

Yeah. I'm going to write some patches to move over to Kunit. Not all distros readily support Kunit. But I think I can come up with a simple header that implements most of what we need. Platforms with Kunit will use it. Otherwise, use the simple header.

I think this will let use standardize the tests without being too much of a burden.

I don't have all of that figured out yet. So for now, I just want to group everything together.

Patch Set 5: Code-Review+1

Thanks fort he answer and also for looking into implementing real kunit.
Patch Set 5: Code-Review+2
Change has been successfully cherry-picked as 672c1432ed0f725ce71c99df9b3791cbc6f28839 by Oleg Drokin

Patch Set 6:

(3 comments)

I see this patch also skipped test_410 in Janitor testing "need MODULES build" because it runs directly from the source build, so it should be fixed to allow running in both cases.

It would also be good to see if test_410 can now be re-enabled on Ubuntu?  It is currently always being skipped.

Never mind, I see that is being fixed in the next patch.

I'll take a look. Probably just need to update load_modules() in t-f.

Patch Set 6:

After looking at https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/31921/30, it seems like sanity/410 works in Janitor. That patch also fixes (most of) the feedback you had. So I think everything is fine.

parents.subject: LU-6142 mdd: Fix style issues for mdd_device.c

commit.subject: LU-16763 kunit: consolidate kernel unit testing
commit.message:
LU-16763 kunit: consolidate kernel unit testing

There are several kernel modules used for different
types of unit testing. Unify them all in one place.
This will make it easier to standardize them in the
future.

Also, ensure kinode.ko is in the right place on
Ubuntu.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity env=ONLY=55,ONLY_REPEAT=10 clientdistro=ubuntu2204
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity env=ONLY=55,ONLY_REPEAT=10
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity env=ONLY=410,ONLY_REPEAT=10
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity env=ONLY=60a,ONLY_REPEAT=10
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I16e5fc3dfb570d88c7ed817eab74511a22e91ac6
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/52597
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
